summary: Iteration 19 - Complete testing of 'Onorari' (Fees) section in admin dashboard. All requested features verified as working correctly: Tab visible and clickable, 4 summary cards, search with magnifying glass, client type filter, status filter, year filter, fees list with print buttons, 'Stampa Tutti' button.
passed_tests: ✅ Tab 'Onorari' (data-testid=tab-fees) visible and clickable in dashboard admin
✅ 4 Summary Cards displayed: Totale Onorari (1), In Attesa (€250,00), Pagati (€0,00), Scaduti (€0,00)
✅ Search field with magnifying glass icon (data-testid=search-fees)
✅ Client type filter (data-testid=filter-client-type) with options: Tutte le categorie, Società, Autonomo, Vivienda Vacacional, Persona Fisica
✅ Status filter (data-testid=filter-status) with options: Tutti gli stati, In attesa, Pagato, Scaduto
✅ Year filter (data-testid=filter-year) with options: Tutti gli anni, 2026, 2025, 2024, 2023, 2022
✅ Fees table with columns: Cliente, Descrizione, Importo, Scadenza, Stato, Azioni
✅ Responsive design with horizontal scroll for table
critical_code_review_comments: GlobalFeesManagement.jsx correctly implements all required features
Backend endpoints /api/fees/all and /api/fees/summary work correctly with all filters
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Responsive design properly implemented with overflow-x-auto for table
seed_data_creation: Using existing fee: 'Consulenza fiscale Dicembre 2025' (€250,00, ID: 313778e9-164c-42c5-b8df-d3e58360ff94)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onorari (Fees) section in admin dashboard is fully functional. Tab is accessible via data-testid='tab-fees'. All filters work correctly (search, client_type, status, year). One existing fee is present for testing. Print functionality opens browser print dialog.

tab_onorari.description: Tab 'Onorari' with Euro icon visible in dashboard tabs

summary_cards.description: 4 cards showing: Totale Onorari, In Attesa, Pagati, Scaduti

search_field.description: Search input with magnifying glass icon, filters by client name or description

client_type_filter.description: Dropdown with: Tutte le categorie, Società, Autonomo, Vivienda Vacacional, Persona Fisica

status_filter.description: Dropdown with: Tutti gli stati, In attesa, Pagato, Scaduto

fees_table.description: Table with columns: Cliente, Descrizione, Importo, Scadenza, Stato, Azioni

print_per_row.description: Print button (printer icon) for each fee row

print_all.description: 'Stampa Tutti' button opens print dialog with all fees

responsive_design.description: Table has horizontal scroll container for smaller screens

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/fees/all: WORKING - Returns list of fees with client info, supports search, client_type, status, year filters
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/fees/summary: WORKING - Returns total_pending, total_paid, total_overdue, total_count
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/clients/{id}/fees: WORKING - Returns fees for specific client
